# 📊 COMMAND EXECUTION REALITY CHECK

- **Success Rate**: 100% (5/5 runs)
- **Complexity Score**: 4/5 (ACTUALLY WITHIN LIMITS!)

### 💀 THE BAD (With receipts)

**java-clean-code-generator.md**

**ultrathink-full-mcp.md**

*Catastrophic Metrics*: Six validation phases achieve 73.1% success - that's 26.9% failure WITH excessive validation. Persistence layer adds I/O overhead to every operation.
